sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101119" key="sunupeca/gw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνυπεξάγω</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <sense id="n101119.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">remove together with</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὸ φάρμακον ς. ἑαυτῷ τι</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archig.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg009:28" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.28</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
